title: Diaminobenzidine (DAB) Staining
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4u4l2","text":"This protocol is used to stain paraffin-embedded mouse brain tissue.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: To paraffin-embedded tissue, deparaffinize in 100% xylenes for 3x 5 minutes.
Perform antigen retrieval by incubating tissue in 1X sodium citrate for 20 minutes at 95 o C. Sodium citrate: 10mM sodium citrate + 0.05% Tween-20, pH6
Incubate in 0.9% H 2 O 2 for 10 minutes at room temperature.
Incubate in blocking buffer for 1 hour at room temperature. Blocking buffer: 10% serum + 0.05% Triton X-100 in 1X PBS
Incubate in primary antibody diluted in blocking buffer overnight at 4 o C.
Incubate in secondary antibody diluted in blocking buffer for 1 hour at room temperature.
Incubate in streptavidin horseradish peroxidase diluted in 1X PBS for 1 hour at room temperature.
Expose to DAB for 3-10 minutes then rinse in 1X PBS for 2x 2 minutes.
Coverslip with Permount and a #1.5 coverslip.
creator: Haley Geertsma
